titles.title: He's The Only Reason I live

verse.name: v1
v2
verse.lines: But if I lose it all, and I am left with nothing, If I have the Lord I know I'll make it through.

verse.name: v3
v4
verse.lines: You see there's nothing in this world Worth living for, It only leaves you empty and longing for more; Oh, He's the only reason I live, But, oh, what a reason.

verse.name: v5
v6
verse.lines: Until you find the Lord and you know The power of His Spirit; He'll be your reason to live and He'll never, (never, never) Let you down.
